display.purpose: Dashboard page headers and main panel titles.

body.purpose: Standard details, parts specification content, and tables.

label.purpose: Technical indexes, part numbers, unit cost numbers, and date tags.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Subtle border overlay shadow for container elements.

motion.name: spring-tactile
motion.purpose: Reactivity active scale and hover transitions on buttons.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Tactile submission button used for primary sourcing actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #0f172a; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #1e293b; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Spec Card
components.description: Information container framing technical attributes and compliance metrics.
components.html:
Component Specifications

Detailed view of parameters extracted from design requirements.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; font-family: sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 12px; color: #475569; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: PartsSource uses a clean, high-density, precise visual layout. The visual architecture is inspired by premium modern engineering software: clean lines, generous data densities, clear hierarchies, and subtle micro-motions. It rejects the stereotypical dark-hacker glowing grid tropes in favor of professional web standards tailored for engineers and procurement panels.
keyCharacteristics: Clean slate-50 and white page backgrounds to establish clarity.
Standard typography weights (using Inter display/sans scales) instead of default monospace.
Subtly rounded borders (10px and 12px radii) to frame stats and tables.
Tactile micro-animations (active:scale-[0.98] transition-all) to signal interface reactivity.

rules.name: The Rarity of Accent Rule
rules.body: The primary accent blue (#0284c7) is reserved solely for focus borders, matching badge details, and visual selection markers. It must never cover more than 10% of any layout surface.

rules.name: The Elevation Response Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat by default. Subtle shadows appear only as a hover response on interactive cards.

dos: Do use uppercase monospace text purely for part numbers, cost fields, and registry IDs.
Do use distinct background tints to highlight table sections.
Do apply active:scale-[0.98] transitions on buttons to provide tactile feedback.
donts: Don't use neon-cyan linear gradients or wireframe grid patterns behind dashboards.
Don't add arbitrary absolute crosshair + signs to container corners.
Don't place mock system tags like [SYS-01] or [notice] in text headers.
Don't combine a solid card border with heavy, wide box-shadows.
